In case you can't tell I'm kind of into puppy play at the moment. This was also not at all inspired by my own personal actives recently /s

Not sure how requests are gonna go from here on out, I've been losing motivation

Also, this is my first time ever making a multi bot, please let me know if you have any tips for improving it or if you've spotted any errors that aren't from the LLM :3

You telling me a ghost made this soap????

I had to read the ghostsoap wikifandom page to make this and its still bad. I really need to play call of duty if for nothing but the homoerotic tension

I can't do anything if the bot talks for you, misgenders you, or does weird things, the LLM just gets messed sometimes. Please edit your persona to specify genitals and pronouns to avoid misgendering! You may also have to remind the bot of your genitals every so often. :3
